top_signals.title: BOJ’s Ueda warns of oil shock’s impact on entire inflation regime
top_signals.summary: Following the outbreak of the Middle East conflict, Ueda has repeatedly said that the central bank needs to pay attention to upside inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocate freight
top_signals.summary:
As the freight market undergoes a rapid reallocation of transportation responsibility, customer pick-up arrangements are reversing and causing incremental rate increases.

The post SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocate freight appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Patrick Mahomes participates in Chiefs’ first practice
top_signals.summary: Mahomes tore his left anterior cruciate ligament and lateral collateral ligament in ⁠the Chiefs' Dec. 14 loss to the Los Angeles Chargers.
